name: Prairie Links Golf Course & Event Center
about: Prairie Links Golf Course & Event Center is an 18-hole facility offering traditional golf and indoor simulator options. The main course is a professionally designed 6,495-yard layout with watered fairways and elevated greens, catering to all skill levels. Members enjoy unlimited access to the golf course, swimming pool, and a full Swing Golf Simulator for indoor practice from April to October. The venue also includes event spaces, dining options, and a pro shop, making it a comprehensive golf and social destination.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited simulator access included with membership
No food and beverage minimums for members
Early tee time booking via private member login
Flexible play options for busy schedules

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service available at Prairie Patio and Grill
Full bar service available at Prairie Patio and Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium unlimited simulator access included with membership (Apr-Oct)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers must bring their own clubs to use both the outdoor course and indoor simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink is not permitted. Members and guests must purchase food and beverages from Prairie Patio and Grill.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole play typically takes 4-5 hours depending on course conditions and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with a swimming pool, junior golf programs, and family-friendly event options.
